title: Xtra Dense Slovakian Minari Dumplings
description: A peppery and dense Slovakian dish featuring minari, shio-koji-cure, and no onion or garlic, served in a bento box.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the chopped minari, shio-koji cure, and flour.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs, milk, salt, and black pepper.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces and shape each piece into a ball.
Flatten each ball into a disk shape and set aside.
Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the dumplings to the skillet and cook for 3 minutes on each side.
Serve the dumplings in a bento box and enjoy.
